business.name: Dps Electrical Contractors Inc.
business.tagline: When the lights matter, we answer

hero.headline: When the power's out, *we pick up*
hero.subheadline: Mike's been wiring New Hanover County for fifteen years. GFI trips, panel upgrades, or complete rewires — we handle it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, outlet, and panel
services_section.subheading: From simple outlet replacements to complete electrical overhauls

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Service Calls
services.description: Old panels can't handle today's electrical demands. We upgrade safely and bring everything up to current code standards.

services.title: GFI & Outlet Installation
services.description: Bathroom outlets, kitchen GFIs, or adding power where you need it. Fast installation with proper safety protocols.

services.title: Complete Home Rewiring
services.description: Full electrical system replacement for older homes. Clean, code-compliant work that passes inspection every time.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repair
services.description: Power outages, sparking outlets, or electrical emergencies. We respond quickly and fix it safely.

about.heading: Family-owned electrical contractors in Wilmington
about.body: DPS Electrical has been serving New Hanover County for over a decade. Mike and the team handle everything from simple outlet repairs to complete electrical system overhauls. When you call, you get straight answers and reliable work — no upselling, no surprises. Just honest electrical service that keeps the lights on.

reviews.name: Alan S.
reviews.text: Called ten electricians about a GFI issue — DPS was the only one who called back. Mike showed up on time and fixed it efficiently.

reviews.name: William W.
reviews.text: Top-notch work whether it's big jobs or small ones. Safety is their priority and they literally saved my life. Been serving this area for fifteen years.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the greater Wilmington area
service_areas.subheading: Reliable electrical service throughout New Hanover County

cta.heading: Need an electrician who answers the phone?
cta.body: Call DPS for fast, reliable electrical work. We show up on time, work safely, and get your power back where it should be.
